overview: Based on the published agenda, the Village of Kronenwetter Board of Review was scheduled to meet to conduct its annual assessment review process, including confirmation of the 2026 Board of Review Notice, examination and certification of the assessment roll, and consideration of property assessment objections.

agenda.item: Confirmation of 2026 Board of Review Notice
Verification of Training Requirements - Affidavit Filed by Clerk - Training Completed by Craig Mortensen
Approval of Previous Meeting Minutes from July 10, 2025 Board of Review Meeting
Filing and Summary of Annual Assessment Report by Assessor's Office - Receive the Assessment Roll and Sworn Affidavit of the Assessor

Examination; Correction of Errors; Certification of Corrections if Warranted; and Acceptance of the Assessment Roll Following a Determination that Open Book Changes are Included in the Assessment Roll Presented
Future Revaluation Update - Update on 2026-2027 Revaluation-Reassessment Tentative Timeline
Review Objections for Acceptability; Schedule, Deny or Waive Hearings for Written Objections Received; and Consider Requests for Subpoena(s) as Needed

discussions.item: Filing and Summary of Annual Assessment Report by Assessor's Office
discussions.body: The Board of Review was set to receive the Assessment Roll and the sworn affidavit of the Assessor's Office as part of the annual assessment report filing process.

discussions.item: Examination and Certification of the Assessment Roll
discussions.body: The board was scheduled to examine the assessment roll, correct any errors identified, and certify corrections if warranted. The board was also expected to accept the assessment roll following a determination that open book changes are included in the roll presented.
The board was set to receive an update on the tentative timeline for the 2026-2027 revaluation-reassessment process.

The board was scheduled to review written objections for acceptability and determine whether to schedule, deny, or waive hearings for those objections. The board was also expected to consider any requests for subpoena(s) as needed.

actionItems: Scheduled to confirm the 2026 Board of Review Notice
Expected to verify training requirements completion by Craig Mortensen
Scheduled to approve previous meeting minutes from July 10, 2025
Expected to receive and examine the Assessment Roll and Assessor's sworn affidavit
Scheduled to examine for errors and certify corrections in the assessment roll
Scheduled to accept the assessment roll following determination that open book changes are included
Expected to receive an update on the 2026-2027 revaluation-reassessment tentative timeline
Scheduled to review written objections and determine hearing scheduling, denials, or waivers
Expected to consider requests for subpoena(s) as needed
title: Board of Review Meeting - 2026-05-13
